chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special High Court Appeal No.17 of 2016 Mrs. Anjum Saleem and others Versus First Dawood Investment Bank Limited and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing (priority) case 1. For order on office objection as at “A”. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.1963/2016 (Stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 27.01.2025 Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, Advocate. M/s. Khalil Ahmed Siddiqui and Zulfiqar Ali, Advocates for Respondent No.1..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Although Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, who is now learned D.A.G, has been appearing for the appellants in the matter but today he has informed us that his Vakalatnama has been superseded. Without prejudice to the above statement, the Vakalatnamas of the appellants are yet to be discharged; there are several counsels representing the appellants, that is, Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, Advocate, who is in attendance, Mir Muhammad Ali Talpur, Advocate and Badar Alam and company. None of them are in attendance. The interim order is also operating. The appeal as such is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
